commit_scope: Teach the route-goal observer to recognize method-specific Form-native mutation rows from the production kernel manifest.

commands: cd api && python3 -m ruff check ../scripts/native_route_goal_loop.py tests/test_runtime_web_api_provenance.py
direct native_route_goal_loop route_status check for bounded mutable ideas/spec routes
local_validation.summary: native_route_goal_loop.py now parses kh-route and raw 43004 method route cells from deploy/kernel-router/production-routes.fk. The no-header native-default rows for POST/PATCH /api/ideas and POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/spec-registry are reported as kernel-native-form-needs-source-lift, executable=true, high_grammar_native=false instead of python-fanout.

known_limitations.observed: These routes remain Form-native executable, not high-grammar BML/domain grammar. The route-goal pressure stays on source lift without misclassifying execution as Python-only.
python3 scripts/native_route_goal_loop.py /goal --source api --seconds 604800 --limit 2000 --json could not complete because the public runtime summary fallback returned HTTP 404 during this slice.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR checks, merge, and production verification.

deploy_validation.notes: The code change is local observer logic over checked-in manifests. Live observation should be rerun when the public runtime endpoint is available.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The native route goal loop stops treating bounded mutable idea/spec defaults as Python fanout. They count toward native executable traffic while still remaining below the high-grammar target.
test_flows: test_native_route_goal_loop_sees_method_specific_form_mutation_routes proves route_status reports Form-native executable status.
test_native_route_goal_loop_counts_form_mutations_as_native_executable proves build_goal_state counts POST /api/ideas in native_executable_events without adding goal_native_events.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete. CI, merge, and post-deploy observation remain before claiming live release.
